title: ricinocarpus ciliatus
intro: Ricinocarpus ciliatus, also known as the ciliatine or hairy ricinocarpus, is a plant species within the family Apocynaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus ciliatus are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
